title: Set titles for timeline items directly through the front end in the Emails & Activities widget

posts.author: KatieMillman (Katie Millman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the ability to set titles for timeline items directly through the front end in the Emails & Activities widget is not supported.

You can set Title, Summary and Content separately through the API but not through the front end

What are you trying to achieve

Please allow filling in the same fields in the front end as you can in the back end.
